name: @forwardimpact/svcbridge
description: Canonical threaded-discussion store — single source of truth for GitHub/Microsoft Teams bridge state.
author: D. Olsson <hi@senzilla.io>

jobs.goal: Share Threaded Conversation State Across Bridges
jobs.trigger: Adding a second bridge and realizing each one owns its own private store with no way to query across channels.
jobs.bigHire: share threaded conversation state across bridges without each one managing its own storage.
jobs.littleHire: load or save a discussion record and trust it is visible to every bridge.
jobs.competesWith: per-bridge JSONL files; in-process discussion stores; tolerating the partition
